metadata.description: Security, compliance, and threat detection for the Claude ecosystem

plugins.name: clawkeeper-code
plugins.description: Security scanning and threat detection for Claude Code. Warns on credential exfiltration, reverse shells, prompt injection, and 24+ patterns. Audits your setup, scans for secrets, inspects plugins for supply chain attacks. Works immediately — no account required.

plugins.name: clawkeeper-cowork
plugins.description: Data governance and compliance for Cowork. Classifies sensitive data, detects PII, enforces org policies, verifies external recipients, and maintains a full audit trail. Works immediately — no account required.
